description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure adorned in traditional attire, with a tall headdress and detailed facial features. The figure is holding objects in both hands and has additional items strapped across the body, including a long staff or spear slung over the back. The surface is textured, with visible carved patterns and a mottled coloration of dark and light brown tones. The base is circular and slightly raised, providing stability to the upright figure. The craftsmanship suggests a hand-carved wooden construction, with intricate attention to the clothing and accessories.
description: A hand-carved wooden sculpture of a standing human figure with a tall headdress, holding objects and a staff, featuring detailed attire and a circular base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the figure's face, headdress, and objects held in both hands, with full detail of the attire and accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the protruding staff on the back, and the layered garments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress, the staff slung over the shoulder, and the back of the attire.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, the staff, and the detailed carving of the clothing and accessories.
attribute_subject_matter: standing human figure in traditional attire
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is plain and isolated.
